title: matelea standleyana
intro: Matelea standleyana, also known as the "Mexican love vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Mexico and Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in alkaloids, including vincamine, which has been shown to have cardiovascular and cognitive benefits. Matelea standleyana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve circulation, and enhance memory.
